title: Landr launches AI tools for musicians: Blueprints and Layers - Music Ally
text:
Earlier this month AI-mastering firm
Landr acquired DAW-maker Reason Studios
, and said that AI features were part of its future roadmap for the latter’s products.
Now Landr has made another AI announcement: the launch of two new ‘creator tools’ called Blueprints and
Layers
as part of its wider Landr Studio subscription for musicians and producers.
“Blueprints is designed for the earliest stages of music creation, whether an artist needs inspiration for a new song or raw materials to sample or extract parts from,”
explained the company
in its announcement.
“Layers takes that output and allows creators to generate professional, mix-ready instrument performances that adapt to a track’s structure, key, and tempo.”
The company stressed that both tools have only been trained on “ethically sourced data from artists who opt in and are compensated for their contributions”.
The actual AI models for Blueprints come from partners including ElevenLabs and Stability AI. Landr noted that those companies are part of a growing network of partners that also includes AudioShake, Aiode and Insoundz.
Stuart Dredge
Music Ally's Head of Insight
More by Stuart Dredge
